approved_model_boundary: Manual pre-publish model export using the documented Agent TReport model boundary for the approved daily publish flow.
source_decision_summary: Approves the manually executed daily publish flow across external evidence collection, model export, actual Telegram delivery, duplicate-send check, and closure verification within the documented scope. A new approval is required for provider-set expansion, model/export boundary changes, added delivery target aliases, scheduler or automation, forced delivery, correction or reannouncement flows, or changed provider payload and credential storage policy.
